footer.description: A fast body mass index calculator with original educational content. Results are for general information only and are not medical advice.

calculator.title: Calculate your BMI
calculator.fixFields: Please fix the fields marked below before calculating.
calculator.copyUnavailable: Copy was not available in this browser.
calculator.downloaded: Result downloaded as a text file.
calculator.medicalShort: This result is for general informational purposes only.
calculator.medicalAdvice: Always consult a qualified healthcare provider for health decisions.

result.emptyTitle: Your BMI result will appear here
result.emptyText: Enter your measurements and select Calculate BMI to see your BMI number, adult category, healthy BMI range, and estimated healthy weight range.
result.disclaimer: This calculator is for general informational purposes only and does not replace professional medical advice. Always consult a qualified healthcare provider for personal health concerns.

descriptions.underweight: Your BMI is below the adult healthy-weight range. This can be worth discussing with a qualified healthcare provider, especially if it is unexpected.
descriptions.normal: Your BMI is within the commonly used adult healthy-weight range. BMI is still only one screening measure, so consider it alongside your wider health context.
descriptions.overweight: Your BMI is above the adult healthy-weight range. BMI does not diagnose health, but it can be a prompt to review habits or speak with a healthcare professional.
descriptions.obesity: Your BMI is in the adult obesity range. This result is not a diagnosis, but a healthcare provider can help interpret it with other measurements and personal factors.

validation.heightCm: Enter a height between 60 cm and 250 cm.
validation.weightKg: Enter a weight between 10 kg and 300 kg.
validation.height: Enter a total height between 24 and 96 inches.
validation.weightLb: Enter a weight between 22 lb and 660 lb.
